//! This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
//! Structure: BinarySearch
#![allow(non_camel_case_types)]
#![allow(unused_parens)]
#![allow(missing_docs)]
#![allow(unused_imports)]
#![allow(unused_variables)]
#![allow(unused_unsafe)]
use std::ptr;

fn ToLowerAscii(value: u8) -> u8 {
    if value >= b'A' && value <= b'Z' {
        value + 32
    } else {
        value
    }
}

fn case_insensitive_equals(left: &str, right: &str) -> bool {
    let left_bytes = left.as_bytes();
    let right_bytes = right.as_bytes();

    if left_bytes.len() != right_bytes.len() {
        return false;
    }

    for i in 0..left_bytes.len() {
        if ToLowerAscii(left_bytes[i]) != ToLowerAscii(right_bytes[i]) {
            return false;
        }
    }

    true
}

fn case_insensitive_compare(left: &str, right: &str) -> i32 {
    let left_bytes = left.as_bytes();
    let right_bytes = right.as_bytes();
    let min_len = if left_bytes.len() < right_bytes.len() { left_bytes.len() } else { right_bytes.len() };

    for i in 0..min_len {
        let left_ch = ToLowerAscii(left_bytes[i]);
        let right_ch = ToLowerAscii(right_bytes[i]);

        if left_ch < right_ch {
            return -1;
        }

        if left_ch > right_ch {
            return 1;
        }
    }

    if left_bytes.len() < right_bytes.len() {
        return -1;
    }

    if left_bytes.len() > right_bytes.len() {
        return 1;
    }

    0
}


pub struct fastdata;
impl fastdata {

    const KEYS: [&'static str; 3] = [
        "Alpha", "bravo", "CHARLIE"
    ];

    #[must_use]
    pub fn contains(key: &str) -> bool {

        let mut lo: usize = 0;
        let mut hi: usize = 3;
        while lo < hi {
            let mid: usize = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
            let mid_key: &str = Self::KEYS[mid];
            let order: i32 = case_insensitive_compare(mid_key, key);

            if order == 0 {
                return true;
            }
            if order < 0 {
                lo = mid + 1;
            } else {
                hi = mid;
            }
        }

        false
    }

    pub const ITEM_COUNT: usize = 3;
    pub const MIN_KEY_LENGTH: i32 = 5;
    pub const MAX_KEY_LENGTH: i32 = 7;
    pub const HAS_NUMBER: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_UPPERCASE: bool = true;
    pub const HAS_LOWERCASE: bool = true;
    pub const HAS_SYMBOL: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_WHITESPACE: bool = false;
}
